mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, address, phone FROM patient
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, address, phone) VALUES (#{patientNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{address}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET patient_no = #{patientNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
